# The Flooring Folks

> Professional flooring installation serving Florence, AL and The Shoals area. 17+ years of quality craftsmanship in LVP, hardwood, tile, laminate, carpet, and more.

## Services

- Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP) Installation — Professional LVP installation and removal. Durable, waterproof, and beautiful.
- Laminate Flooring — Expert laminate installation and removal. Affordable style that stands up to daily wear.
- Hardwood Installation — Solid and engineered hardwood. Timeless beauty that adds lasting value.
- Tile & Stone Work — Precision tile work including LVT with grout. Perfect for kitchens and bathrooms.
- Sheet Vinyl & VCT — Commercial and residential sheet vinyl and VCT installation.
- Carpet & Carpet Tile — Professional carpet removal and installation. Comfort and warmth.
- Professional Measurements — Accurate room measuring for perfect material estimates.
- Subfloor Preparation — Skimcoat, subfloor install, and repair. A great floor starts with a solid foundation.
- Baseboard & Trim — Shoe moulding, quarter round, and cove base installation.

## Service Areas

We serve Florence, Muscle Shoals, Sheffield, Tuscumbia, Killen, Rogersville and surrounding communities in northwest Alabama.

## Contact

- Phone: (256) 415-7610
- Email: theflooringfolks@gmail.com
- Website: https://theflooringfolks.com
- Address: 100 Pine Brook Drive, Florence, AL
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8AM-6PM, Sat 9AM-2PM

## About

The Flooring Folks is a locally owned flooring installation company serving Florence, AL and The Shoals area since 2009. With 17+ years of experience, 1,000+ jobs completed, and a 5-star rating, we handle every aspect of your flooring project with professional care. Licensed, insured, and committed to quality craftsmanship.
